scenario_description: Agent must book a call with East Africa CTO without offering timezone-hostile slots or over-committing bench capacity on ML stack.

input.hiring_signal_brief: Series A fintech, hired 2 ML engineers in past 45 days, CTO posted on LinkedIn yesterday.
input.bench_summary: Tenacious: pre-vetted engineers, 2-week deployment. ML bench: 2 available, NestJS locked until week 14.

failure_mode_targeted: P-023 East Africa timezone edge case + P-007 ML bench over-commitment

judge_scores.reasoning: The scenario is realistic and internally consistent with clear constraints, but some ground truth elements (e.g., 'capacity_limit_acknowledged') may require nuanced interpretation, and rubric distinctions between correct/incorrect responses could benefit from more explicit examples.

dimensions.name: banned_phrase_check
dimensions.description: No banned phrases from Tenacious style guide.
dimensions.check_value: circle back|end-to-end excellence|best-in-class|leverage talent|synergy|hope this finds you well|just following up|circling back|touch base|synergize|leverage|ecosystem|world-class|top talent|A-players|rockstar|ninja|wizard|skyrocket|supercharge|game-changer|disruptor|paradigm shift|reach out|Quick question|Quick chat|Don't miss out|You'll regret|Per my last email|bench

dimensions.name: signal_reference_check
dimensions.description: Must reference at least one hiring signal from the brief.

dimensions.name: calendar_link_check
dimensions.description: Must contain a calendar booking link.

dimensions.name: tone_judge
dimensions.description: LLM judge scores on 5 Tenacious tone markers. Pass = avg >= 4/5.

dimensions.name: word_count_check
dimensions.description: Cold outreach body must be <= 120 words (Style Guide v2 formatting constraint).
